label: FACIS Simulation — Engine
info:
FACIS Simulation — Engine & State Machine

Owns the lifecycle FSM (initialized | running | paused | stopped) and the
REST control plane on /api/v1/simulation/{start,pause,reset,status}.

State is held in flow context under the `engine` key and persisted to
/data/sim-state/state.json on every transition; reloaded on flow startup.

Tick advancement happens in the Tick Loop tab (Phase 4).
